name: RWC Regional Wellness Center
description: RWC Regional Wellness Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Estherville, IA. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, lights, locker rooms, and water.
open_play_schedule: Call ahead to confirm availability and level of play.
